benchmark_and_eval.role: round1 benchmark orchestrator, case building, normalization, aggregation, markdown reporting
round2 reranker + OCR/VLM slices reusing existing local repo logic
CLI entrypoint for resumable benchmark execution by group
manifest for benchmark groups, fairness, output policy and smoke limits

provider_model_comparison.role: provider/model candidate execution and heuristic quality scoring
leaderboards by provider/model/runtime bucket/quantization family/use case
provider/runtime capability resolution and model availability filtering

runtime_logging_reporting_store.role: SQLite-backed eval store reused by diagnosis and decision logic
task health, persistent failure and adaptation candidate diagnosis
environment/provider inventory snapshots and benchmark runtime metadata
eval diagnosis report generation from the Phase 8 store

smallest_extension_to_implement_first.title: round0_audit_and_closure_bundle
smallest_extension_to_implement_first.why: The smallest safe extension is to consolidate one audit/closure layer over the existing benchmark + eval artifacts before expanding or rerunning anything heavier.

decision_thresholds.notes: Decision-gate thresholds priorizam ganhos claros e conservadores antes de justificar adaptação leve.
